features.description: Onboard batch 7 tracks (7 songs) into lib/albums.ts. MP3s are already at public/audio/{slug}.mp3, covers at public/covers/{slug}.jpg. Songs to onboard: a-hundred-nos, how-have-i-been-complicit, seventy-five-businesses, the-giant-piece-of-shit, the-long-game, thinking-in-bets, crossing-the-chasm. For EACH song: (1) Read the lyrics from content/songs/batch7/lyrics/{slug}.md to get metadata (Title, Album, Source, Genre, Mood, etc.) and full lyrics. (2) Read the research brief from content/songs/batch7/research/{slug}.md for concept, keyInsight, storyBehind, keyQuote, quoteSpeaker. (3) Read the annotation draft from content/songs/batch7/annotations/{slug}.json for pre-written annotations. (4) Add the track object to the correct album's track array in lib/albums.ts. The track object needs ALL fields: slug, title, albumSlug, trackNumber (next available in that album), duration (get from MP3 metadata or estimate from lyrics length — use '3:00' as default), audioUrl: '/audio/{slug}.mp3', coverImage: '/covers/{slug}.jpg', genre, mood, lyrics (the full lyrics text without metadata headers), concept, keyInsight, sources (array of {title, type, url, guest}), keyQuote, quoteSpeaker, storyBehind, tags (3-5 relevant topic tags), annotations (from the JSON file), releaseDate: '2026-03-24'. (5) Find the right album by checking the metadata Album field in the lyrics file. Map to existing album slugs. If no album matches, add to 'the-startup-life' as default. DONE: All 7 batch 7 tracks appear in lib/albums.ts with complete metadata. DO NOT TOUCH: existing tracks. VERIFY: pnpm build passes.
steps: Read all 7 batch 7 lyrics files for metadata
Add each track to the correct album in lib/albums.ts

features.description: Onboard batch 7.5 tracks (7 songs) into lib/albums.ts. MP3s at public/audio/{slug}.mp3, covers at public/covers/{slug}.jpg. Songs: coding-is-solved, the-hard-thing, the-hiring-playbook, the-obsession, the-value-loop, three-eras, we-havent-built-windows-yet. For EACH: (1) Read lyrics from content/songs/batch7.5/lyrics/{slug}.md for metadata and lyrics. (2) Read research brief if it exists at content/songs/batch7.5/research/{slug}.md. (3) Add the track to the correct album in lib/albums.ts with all fields (same pattern as task 1). For annotations: use mcp__lennysdata__search_content and mcp__lennysdata__read_excerpt to research 3-5 annotations per track. Find lyric lines that reference specific Lenny content, write factual notes. (4) Map albums from metadata: 'electric-dreams' for AI songs, 'the-startup-life' for startup songs, 'the-craft' for product craft, 'the-weight' for leadership, 'the-talent-search' for hiring. DONE: All 7 batch 7.5 tracks in lib/albums.ts with metadata and annotations. DO NOT TOUCH: existing tracks. VERIFY: pnpm build passes.
steps: Use Lenny MCP to research annotations for each song
Add each track to correct album in lib/albums.ts

features.description: QA Round 1 — PM Persona. Pretend you are Sarah, a senior PM at a Series B startup who listens to Lenny's Podcast weekly. She clicked a link in Lenny's Slack and has 5 minutes. Read EVERY page file: app/page.tsx, app/album/[slug]/AlbumPageClient.tsx, app/track/[slug]/TrackPageClient.tsx, app/songs/page.tsx, and all components in components/. Walk through the user journey. Write content/qa/round1-pm-audit.md: First Impressions, Navigation Issues, Content Quality, Top 5 Issues (ranked by impact). Be brutally honest. DONE: Audit file exists. DO NOT TOUCH: code. VERIFY: pnpm build passes.
steps: Read all page and component files

features.description: Fix top 3 code-fixable issues from Round 1 PM audit. Read content/qa/round1-pm-audit.md Top 5 Issues. Fix the top 3 that can be fixed with code changes (skip anything needing new assets, design overhaul, or Eric's input). For each: read file, make minimal change, verify build. DONE: Top 3 issues fixed. DO NOT TOUCH: lib/audio-context.tsx. VERIFY: pnpm build passes.

Audit ALL annotations for quality. Read lib/albums.ts, check every track with annotations. For each annotation verify: (1) lyricText appears in that track's lyrics, (2) note is specific and factual, not vague, (3) it doesn't feel force-fit. Write content/qa/annotation-audit.md with verdicts per track: GOOD, NEEDS WORK, or FORCE-FIT. For FORCE-FIT, suggest fix. DONE: Audit file exists. DO NOT TOUCH: code. VERIFY: pnpm build passes.

Fix FORCE-FIT annotations from the audit. Read content/qa/annotation-audit.md. For each FORCE-FIT: find a better lyric line, rewrite the note, or remove the annotation. Use mcp__lennysdata__search_content to verify facts. Every remaining annotation must feel natural. DONE: No force-fit annotations. VERIFY: pnpm build passes.
steps: Fix each flagged annotation in lib/albums.ts

features.description: QA Round 2 — Contest Judge Persona. Pretend you are a Lenny contest judge evaluating entries. You care about: creativity, technical quality, faithfulness to Lenny's content, and 'would I share this?'. Read all pages and components again (they may have changed from Round 1 fixes). Write content/qa/round2-judge-audit.md: Wow Factor Score (1-10), Faithfulness Score (1-10), Polish Score (1-10), Top 3 Things That Would Win, Top 3 Things Holding It Back, Verdict. DONE: Audit exists. DO NOT TOUCH: code. VERIFY: pnpm build passes.
steps: Read all page and component files

features.description: Fix top 2 code-fixable issues from Round 2 judge audit. Read content/qa/round2-judge-audit.md 'Top 3 Things Holding It Back'. Fix the top 2 that are code-fixable. DONE: Issues fixed. VERIFY: pnpm build passes.

QA Round 3 — Lenny Himself. Pretend you are Lenny Rachitsky evaluating this entry. You care about accuracy, respect for your content, and whether this makes you smile. Read lib/albums.ts thoroughly — all track data, sources, quotes. Use mcp__lennysdata__search_content to spot-check 5 random tracks for accuracy. Write content/qa/round3-lenny-audit.md: What Would Make Lenny Smile, Accuracy Issues, Misrepresentations, Missing Topics, Overall Verdict. DONE: Audit exists. DO NOT TOUCH: code. VERIFY: pnpm build passes.

Fix accuracy issues from Lenny audit. Read content/qa/round3-lenny-audit.md. Fix any misattributions, wrong sources, or inaccurate quotes in lib/albums.ts. Use mcp__lennysdata__search_content and mcp__lennysdata__read_excerpt to verify corrections. Only fix clearly wrong facts. DONE: Accuracy issues resolved. VERIFY: pnpm build passes.

QA Round 4 — Mobile User Persona. Pretend you are Jamie, scrolling on their phone during a commute. Read all components with mobile in mind — check for 'hidden sm:', responsive classes, touch targets (buttons < 44px are too small). Write content/qa/round4-mobile-audit.md: Touch Target Issues, Truncation Problems, Layout Breaks, Readability Concerns, Top 5 Mobile Issues. DONE: Audit exists. DO NOT TOUCH: code. VERIFY: pnpm build passes.
steps: Read all components focusing on mobile classes

features.description: Fix top 3 mobile issues from Round 4. Read content/qa/round4-mobile-audit.md. Fix the top 3 code-fixable mobile issues. Common fixes: increase touch target sizes, fix truncation, adjust responsive breakpoints. DONE: Top 3 mobile issues fixed. VERIFY: pnpm build passes.
